http.connectionFailed: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome to ClockTale. Discover anime and stories for every taste and follow the latest trends.
login.imageAlt: Night scene with moon and person contemplating
login.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Check your details and try again.

logout.apiError: Could not reach the server to sign out. Your session on this device was cleared.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Welcome to ClockTale. Discover anime and stories for every taste and follow the latest trends.
register.imageAlt: Red moon and silhouette in a night scene
register.usernamePlaceholder: Unique name that identifies you (cannot be changed)
register.nicknamePlaceholder: How we and others should call you
register.passwordRulesTitle: Password must meet the following criteria:
register.validationUsernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
register.validationNicknameMin: Nickname must be at least 3 characters.
register.validationPasswordRules: The password does not meet all criteria.
register.successToast: Account created. Sign in to continue.
register.registerFailed: Could not complete registration. Please try again.

admin.entityNotFound: We could not find this record. It may have been removed.
admin.unauthorized: Unauthorized. Please check that you are signed in.
